metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace backing Microsoft Sentinel.

properties.description: File-hash matches for Banana RAT, TrickMo/Coper, and TCLBANKER samples across file, process and image-load telemetry. All GTI-confirmed malicious. Sub-technique: T1204.002.
properties.query:
let badHashes = dynamic([
    "38dfeb772afbd01c04eddda120d283acfb1147a6dc3d54ac62fe23ad06e39d8f",
    "d7545b6dacebdae27effb3c778c5e349027ec789c76ae4f777bd9ba56a70cdaa",
    "01889a9ec2abecb73e5e8792be68a4e3bc7dcbe1c3f19ac06763682d63aa8c21",
    "143c0e12d2aa1bdecde59f273139dd5605d00f61cda7f626224e07390119c026",
    "701d51b7be8b034c860bf97847bd59a87dca8481c4625328813746964995b626",
    "8a174aa70a4396547045aef6c69eb0259bae1706880f4375af71085eeb537059",
    "668f932433a24bbae89d60b24eee4a24808fc741f62c5a3043bb7c9152342f40",
    "63beb7372098c03baab77e0dfc8e5dca5e0a7420f382708a4df79bed2d900394"
]);
union DeviceFileEvents, DeviceProcessEvents, DeviceImageLoadEvents
| where SHA256 in (badHashes)
| extend Algorithm = "SHA256", AdvisoryName = "Banking Trojan Hash IOCs (3-pack)"
| project Timestamp, Type, DeviceName, FileName, FolderPath, SHA256, Algorithm, InitiatingProcessFileName, AdvisoryName, ReportId

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: File-hash matches for Banana RAT, TrickMo/Coper, and TCLBANKER samples across file, process and image-load telemetry. All GTI-confirmed malicious. Sub-technique: T1204.002.
